notes: Missing scalar values are written as null in JSON and empty cells in CSV.
Clearly unreasonable records, such as negative distances/weights/volumes or records without customer ids, are skipped.
The requested key name 'loaction' is preserved; a correctly spelled duplicate key 'location' is also included.

The problem statement says 30 customers are in the green area, but applying the stated radius-10-km rule to the coordinate file gives 15 customers. The JSON field if_in_green_area follows the coordinate rule.
